hero.quote: Where Beauty Blooms Like Cherry Blossoms
hero.title: Sakura
hero.subtitle: salon
hero.description: Welcome to Sakura Salon, your cozy retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. Experience our range of services designed to pamper you from head to toe.

premium.title: Premium Products
premium.description: Organic and natural beauty products for the best care

experts.title: Expert Stylists
experts.description: Professional team with years of experience

relaxing.title: Relaxing Atmosphere
relaxing.description: Peaceful environment for your complete relaxation

spa.title: Japanese Head Spa & Relaxation
spa.description: Immerse yourself in the ancient art of Japanese head spa - a soothing ritual designed to melt stress, improve scalp health, and restore inner peace. Experience our professional and refreshing treatment, crafted with care, and leave feeling rejuvenated and balanced.

beauty.title: Beauty Care: Nails, Lashes & Brows
beauty.description: Elevate your elegance with our bespoke beauty services, from flawless nails and gorgeous lashes to perfectly shaped brows. Achieve your natural charm, shine into a world-class experience with confidence, and let your beauty bloom like cherry blossoms.

exclusiveServices.sameInfo: Contact me from the same Info

japaneseHeadSpa.title: Japanese Head Spa
japaneseHeadSpa.description: Indulge in the ultimate relaxation with our authentic Japanese Head Spa. Combining traditional techniques with modern care, this treatment includes scalp massage, deep cleansing, aromatherapy, and stress relief. Perfect for rejuvenating your mind and restoring scalp health.

dryHeadSpa.title: Dry Head SPA
dryHeadSpa.description: Experience deep relaxation with our Dry Head SPA - a specialized treatment focusing on acupressure, stress relief, and pain release. This soothing session includes head, neck, and shoulder massage, promoting better sleep and mental clarity without water or products.

imperialRetreat.title: The imperial retreat
imperialRetreat.description: Experience deep relaxation and scalp rejuvenation with our exclusive IMPERIAL RETREAT. Enjoy a luxurious 120-minute session featuring Japanese head spa techniques, aromatherapy, hot towel treatment, nourishing hair masks, shoulder & arm massage, and a refreshing herbal tea. Complete bliss for mind and body.

nailArt.title: Premium Nail Art
nailArt.description: Transform your nails into stunning works of art with our premium nail art services. From classic French manicures to intricate designs, gel polish, nail extensions, and custom artwork. Our skilled technicians use high-quality products for long-lasting, beautiful results.

lashExtension.title: Lash Extensions
lashExtension.description: Enhance your natural beauty with our professional lash extension services. Choose from classic, volume, or hybrid styles using premium silk lashes. Our certified lash artists create customized looks that complement your eye shape for stunning, natural-looking results.

browStyling.title: Eyebrow Styling
browStyling.description: Perfect your brows with our comprehensive eyebrow styling services. Includes shaping, threading, tinting, and microblading consultations. Our expert stylists create the ideal brow shape to frame your face and enhance your natural features.

gallery.subtitle: Explore our beautiful transformations and serene spa atmosphere

testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our satisfied clients about their experiences

client1.text: The Japanese Head Spa was absolutely amazing! I felt so relaxed and rejuvenated. The staff is professional and the atmosphere is so peaceful. Highly recommend!

client2.text: Best nail art experience I've ever had! The attention to detail is incredible. My nails look stunning and the service was top-notch. Will definitely come back!

client3.text: I've been coming here for months and every visit is perfect. The lash extensions are beautiful and last so long. The team really knows what they're doing!

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for bookings or inquiries
contact.hoursDetails: Mon-Sat: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM | Sun: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM

form.name: Your Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...

footer.about: Experience authentic Japanese relaxation and beauty services in a serene atmosphere. Your journey to wellness begins here.

chatbot.welcome: Hello! Welcome to Sakura Saloon. How can I help you today?

responses.booking: Great! You can book an appointment by calling us at +1 (555) 123-4567 or clicking the 'Book Now' button on our website. We're available Mon-Sat 9AM-8PM.
responses.services: We offer Japanese Head Spa, Nail Art & Extensions, Lash Extensions, and Eyebrow Styling. Each service is performed by our expert team in a serene atmosphere. Would you like to know more about a specific service?
responses.pricing: Our pricing varies by service. Head Spa starts at $80, Nail services from $45, and Lash Extensions from $120. Contact us for detailed pricing and package deals!
responses.hours: We're open Monday to Saturday: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM, and Sunday: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM. Walk-ins welcome, but appointments are recommended!
responses.location: We're located at 123 Sakura Street, Beauty District. Easy parking available and just 5 minutes from downtown. See you soon!
